# ToolFailureMechanism enumeration

The two distinct mechanisms for reporting that something went wrong with a `tools/call`. Choosing the correct one is a MUST (R-22.5-a, AC-34.18).

```csharp
public enum ToolFailureMechanism
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ProtocolError | `0` | A JSON-RPC `error` (`-32602`): the request could not be dispatched (R-22.5-c). |
| ErrorResult | `1` | A successful `result` with `isError: true`: the tool ran but failed (R-22.5-b). |
